items.name: AahYesHello Computer Shoulder Pet
items.description:
One of the sentinel objects created by the EDM artist AahYesHello in the lore.

AahYesHello or fully known as aahyeshello.zip is an unpacked folder of various files that has
combined made an application for an sentinel AI program that he named AahYesHello. He is
by far the youngest sentinel of the three. The Creator executed the program on his father’s
old computer after finishing aahyeshello.zip. AahYesHello was taught by The Creator on how
to make music by itself on softwares like FL Studio since the program was sentinel. This
grew as interest on AahYesHello very quickly.


Modelled by @Hai_fin

Based of the lore of EDM artist AahYesHello
